description: PULSE pipeline Step 3 × Cluster 3 (Schema Validation Engine) — code + structure snapshot.

tables.name: governance.structure_qc_table
tables.purpose: Schema validation issues. One row per issue detected during Step 3. Append-only.

tables.name: reference.metadata
tables.purpose: Dictionary definitions synced from CURRENT_core_metadata_dictionary.xlsx. One row per (lake_table_name, lake_variable_name, source_type).

metadata_dictionary.usage: Master dictionary defining expected schema for all lake tables. Synced to reference.metadata by Step 4.

functions.name: validate_schema
functions.description: Step 3 orchestrator: verify ingest_id, load expected schema from reference.metadata, compare all raw tables, write issues to structure_qc_table.

functions.name: compare_fields
functions.description: Pure function. Compare expected vs observed schema for a single table. Detects missing columns, extra columns, type mismatches, and target type discrepancies.

scripts.purpose: Human-friendly Step 3 entry: set ingest_id, optionally sync metadata, call validate_schema(), print summary.
Review script for examining Step 3 validation results.
Step 3A wrapper: build expected schema dictionary from ingest_dictionary and Postgres metadata.
